title: Meet with Graws and make a difference in animals' lives
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Be part of a movement...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Be part of a movement that drives positive change in the lives of animals.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Be part of a movement that drives positive change in the lives of animals."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Join Graws for an inspiring meeting at the Thibault Room, Drostdy Hotel tomorrow, Friday 11 April, at 17:15."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This meeting will give you a deeper understanding of Graws' mission and how you can make a difference.","html":"This meeting will give you a deeper understanding of Graws' mission and how you can make a difference."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact Carlin Raath on 063 559 5823.","html":"For more information, contact Carlin Raath on 063 559 5823."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Meet with Graws and make a difference in animals' lives
